title: OmniSelect run results.json
description: Schema of the per-run artifact written by every run_*_experiment.py runner (one file per run_id x seed). Canonical whitelisted instances live under results_canonical/.

config.description: Resolved run configuration: dataset, model, pool/budget sizes, noise fraction, seed, env-derived options. Keys vary by modality runner.

fidelity_config.description: Present only for FIDELITY_MODE=published-core* runs: the published-equation parameters of the external baseline being exercised.

sel_sha12.description: 12-hex fingerprint of the sorted selected IDs (pairing/parity checks)

clean_pct.description: fraction of selected samples whose provenance tag is clean/high

metric.description: primary task metric; name and direction are modality-specific (top-1 / ROC AUC / macro-F1 higher is better, MASE lower is better)

adapt_manifest.description: Controller decision record: leaderboard, chosen strategy, best reference, switch margin, kappa_hat, and method-v2 candidate notes (v2d/v2e/v2f) when enabled.

pairing_manifest.description: PAIRED_RNG=1 fingerprints: arrays_sha256 of the exact pool/validation/test numeric arrays plus the shared-initialization and training-order rules.
